title: The Agricultural Produce (Grading and Marking) Act, 1937
full_text: The Agricultural Produce (Grading and Marking) Act, 1937 कृषि उपज (श्रेणीकरण और चिह्नांकन)अधिनियम, 1937 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193701 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 1937-02-24 Act Year: 1937 Short Title: The Agricultural Produce (Grading and Marking) Act, 1937 Hindi Title: कृषि उपज (श्रेणीकरण और चिह्नांकन)अधिनियम, 1937 Long Title: An Act to provide for the grading and marking of agricultural and other produce. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 24-02-1937 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Agricultural Produce (Grading and Marking) Act, 1937 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Explanations. Section 3. Prescription of grade designations. Show Related Subordinates Section 3A. Powers of entry, inspection and search. Section 3B. Powers of the authorised officer to seize agricultural produce. Section 4. Penalty for unauthorised marking with grade designation mark. Section 5. Penalty for counterfeiting grade designation mark. Section 5A. Penalty for selling migraded articles. Section 5B. Power to prescribe compulsory grade designations in respect of certain articles. Section 5C. Institution of prosecution. Section 6. Extension of application of Act. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
